headline: RISK THINKING, NOT RISK PAPERWORK
subheading: Apply ICH Q9 to make proportionate, defensible decisions your inspectors will trust.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial composition evoking pharmaceutical quality risk management and structured decision-making. A luminous network of interconnected teal and cyan nodes floats over a deep navy background, the lines weighting and branching like a calibrated risk-assessment map, some pathways glowing brighter to suggest severity and probability being weighed. A flowing four-stage current threads through the lattice, conveying assess, control, communicate and review without any labels. Translucent layered glass panels and a faint precision-instrument dial motif add a clinical-luxury depth, while a single fresh-green accent light marks a clear point of focus where reasoning resolves into a confident decision. Soft volumetric lighting, shallow depth of field, brushed-steel and frosted-glass textures, calm premium high-end mood, balanced negative space on the left for overlaid copy. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
